mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_service_message (user_id, user_name, message, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{message}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM customer_service_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} OR user_id = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM customer_service_message ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM customer_service_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} OR user_id = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
